import pandas as pd

business_names = pd.DataFrame(locals()['var_function-call-4674808107953043828'])
average_ratings = pd.DataFrame(locals()['var_function-call-10946268087619348540'])

merged_data = pd.merge(business_names, average_ratings, on='gmap_id')
result = merged_data.sort_values(by='average_rating', ascending=False).to_json(orient='records')

print('__RESULT__:')
print(result)
